policies: No refunds after 7 days of purchase.
24/7 customer support is available only for Pro and Enterprise plan customers.
You can cancel your subscription at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period.
AutoStream offers a 14-day free trial for the Pro plan — no credit card required.
Annual plans come with a 20% discount compared to monthly billing.
Data is stored securely on AWS with AES-256 encryption.
Unused video exports do not roll over to the next month on the Basic plan.

faq.question: Can I switch between plans?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Changes take effect on the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Does AutoStream support team collaboration?
faq.answer: Pro plan supports up to 5 team members. Enterprise plan supports unlimited collaborators.

faq.question: What video formats does AutoStream support for import?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM for import on all plans.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial for the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faq.question: Which social platforms does AutoStream publish to directly?
faq.answer: AutoStream supports direct publishing to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook.
